title: Road Types
description: Three road types with different efficiencies: dirt (lowest), gravel (medium), and paved (highest). Early game has public dirt roads on flat terrain between cities in the same country. Road type affects travel speed and caravan efficiency.
definition-of-done: Three road types are implementable. Each has distinct efficiency values. Roads render visually distinct. Initial public dirt roads generate between cities.
testing-plan: Verify three road types have different efficiency values. Test visual distinction. Verify initial dirt roads generate correctly.
todos: Create visual rendering for each type
Build initial road generation for cities
unknowns: Visual style for each road type
